text: Imagine a teaspoon of matter weighing billions of tons. That’s the reality of neutron stars, the remnants of supernova explosions. These stellar corpses pack more mass than our Sun into a sphere the size of a city. One teaspoon of neutron star material could crush anything on Earth. Their intense gravity creates bizarre phenomena, like pulsars—rotating stars emitting beams of radiation. Curious about more cosmic wonders? Hit follow for the latest in astrophysics!
